name: the drafter accounts for every clause exactly once — the no-language-silently-dropped contract
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/draft-custom-rule.sh" --rule-id g-multi --tool eslint --prose 'Never use var. Avoid console.log. The names should be clear. Use strict equality.' --json > d.json 2>e.txt; rc=$?; node -e 'const d=require(process.cwd()+"/d.json");const s=d.clauses_covered+d.clauses_fallback+d.clauses_unenforceable;if(s!==d.clauses_total)process.exit(1);if(d.no_clause_dropped!==true)process.exit(1)' && [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && echo no-clause-dropped 1>&2
